steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the duration of the EVA. The answer must lead with or prominently feature the time length (7 hours and 55 minutes).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Ortega and Nair completed an EVA, also known as a spacewalk, in which they left the spacecraft to replace instruments on the Hubble Space Telescope.: focuses on the task performed during the spacewalk, not how long it lasted. ✗
  • Choice B — Lasting 7 hours and 55 minutes, Ortega and Nair's EVA is one of the longest spacewalks completed to date.: opens with "Lasting 7 hours and 55 minutes," placing duration first and connecting it to the EVA's rank among the longest spacewalks ever. ✓
  • Choice C — During their time as crew members of Expedition 14, Ortega and Nair completed an EVA.: omits any duration information entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — The EVA completed by Expedition 14 crew members Ortega and Nair took place from September 18, 2006, to April 21, 2007.: misapplies the Expedition 14 mission dates to the EVA itself rather than stating the EVA's actual duration. ✗
That matches Choice B — Lasting 7 hours and 55 minutes, Ortega and Nair's EVA is one of the longest spacewalks completed to date..
